title: Nurse Manager /Assistant Nurse Manager
description:
Nursing Head (Nursing & Therapy) / Senior Staff Nurse

Location: North East Region | Sector: Healthcare Management / Eldercare

Senior Leadership Role: Drive Clinical Excellence & Operational Strategy
This is a distinguished opportunity for an experienced nursing leader. Choose your path: lead the entire Nursing & Therapy department as the Head, or step up as a Senior Staff Nurse providing advanced clinical leadership. Shape policy, ensure compliance, and elevate the standard of care.

Your Key Responsibilities:

  • For Head Role: Assist the Superintendent in the full management of the Home, ensuring compliance with the Destitute Persons Act and all relevant regulations.

  • Plan, manage, and oversee the safe, efficient, and quality delivery of all healthcare services.

  • Develop and implement policies, SOPs, and quality management systems.

  • Provide strong clinical leadership, supervision, and professional development for all nursing and therapy staff.

  • Manage budgets, resources, and stakeholder reporting for the department.

  • For Senior Nurse Role: Provide advanced clinical expertise, act as a role model, and take on significant supervisory duties in support of the Head Nurse.

Who We Are Looking For:

  • Qualification: Degree, Advanced Diploma, or Diploma in Nursing.

  • Mandatory: Full or Conditional registration with the Singapore Nursing Board (SNB).

  • Experience: Minimum 3-5 years of proven supervisory, management, or leadership experience.

  • Experience in aged care, social service, or a therapy-integrated environment is highly preferred.

  • Strong knowledge of policy development, quality assurance, and staff performance management.

  • Excellent strategic, administrative, and communication skills.

Schedule & Commitment:

  • For Head (Nursing & Therapy): Monday to Friday office hours (e.g., 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM or 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM). 44-hour work week.

  • For Senior Staff Nurse: Monday to Friday, plus required to work on Public Holidays. Similar office hours. 44-hour work week.

  • Employment Type: Full-Time, Permanent.

What We Offer:

  • A top-tier leadership position with significant influence.

  • The opportunity to shape care standards and lead a dedicated team.

  • A challenging and rewarding role at the intersection of clinical care and management.

  • Comprehensive benefits and professional development support.

Lead the future of care with us.
We are searching for an exceptional nursing leader. If you have the experience and vision, we invite you to apply for this key appointment.

📩 Interested applicants, please send your updated CV and availability.

People Profilers Pte Ltd

Address: 20 Cecil Street, #08-09, Plus Building, Singapore 049705

Contact: +65 6950 9740

EA Licence No.: 02C4944

EA Personnel Reg. No.: R21100787

EA Personnel: Cheong Xiang Rui Enoch

Since our humble beginnings in 2002, People Profilers has steadily grown from strength to strength. Our expertise in providing Human Capital consultancy to our clients – universally sought after skills and expertise in just about any sector– has allowed People Profilers to leave an imprint across various industries and build a reputation for competency and expertise.

 

What differentiates People Profilers from every other recruiter is our unwavering commitment to building relationships with our clients- understanding exactly what our clients are after, and allowing us to match their precise needs. We deliver human capital solutions that allow organisations and their employees to succeed.

 

Here at People Profilers, we pride ourselves on being a one-stop human capital solutions provider for your organisation. Our innovative and relationship-focused workforce solutions have been provided across a wide range of industries.
